pricing.title: Simple & Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No subscription, no hidden fees. Pay once, use forever.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to your questions here

items.question: Is Disk Mop safe?
items.answer: Yes, Disk Mop is 100% safe. It contains no viruses, malware, or adware. It doesn't touch system files, only detects and cleans unnecessary files (cache, temp files, duplicates). It shows you every file before deletion and waits for your confirmation.

items.question: Which operating systems are supported?
items.answer: Disk Mop supports Windows 10/11 (64-bit) and macOS 12+ (Apple Silicon and Intel). It's developed as a native application for both platforms.

items.question: How does the license work?
items.answer: Pay $19.90 once for lifetime access. 1 license = 1 computer. No subscription, no extra charges. If you change computers, you can transfer your license to the new one.

items.question: How do I pay?
items.answer: You make a one-time payment through Polar.sh's secure payment infrastructure. Credit cards and other payment methods are supported.

items.question: Are updates free?
items.answer: Yes, all updates and new features are free for life. You can receive automatic updates from within the app.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Disk Mop works entirely locally. Your files are never sent to any server. Internet connection is only used for license verification and updates. All scanning and cleaning operations happen on your computer.

items.question: Does it conflict with antivirus software?
items.answer: No, Disk Mop is fully compatible with all major antivirus software (Windows Defender, Avast, Kaspersky, Norton, etc.). It's a digitally signed secure application.

items.question: Is Linux supported?
items.answer: Currently Windows and macOS are supported. Linux support is on our roadmap. Subscribe to our newsletter to follow developments.
